name: Nora Mill Whole Wheat Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 4 cups NORA MILL whole wheat flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1 tablespoon of dry yeast with 1/2 cup warm water and 1 tablespoon of sugar. Let the mixture rise.
2. Sift together all flours, baking soda, salt, and 2 tablespoons of sugar.
3. Add shortening to the sifted ingredients and blend well using hands until a dough forms.
4. Gradually add buttermilk and yeast, mixing until combined.
5. Roll out the dough and cut into desired shapes.
6. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 12 minutes.
7. The biscuit rolls can be refrigerated for up to two weeks.
